# RC-07: Rollback Plan Validation

**Track:** Risk Controls (`RC`) · **Priority:** SHOULD (recommended) · **Status:** draft

Verify the rollback strategy: define specific triggers that will initiate a rollback, test the rollback procedure in a pre-production environment, and confirm the decision authority for initiating rollback during a live deployment. The rollback procedure must be executable within a defined time window.

## Required In Stages

| Stage | Name | Applicability |
|-------|------|---------------|
| 5 | Deployment & Release | Mandatory |

## Delegation

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Pattern** | Agent validates, human approves |
| **Agent does** | Validate rollback plan completeness; execute rollback test in pre-production; report results. |
| **Human does** | Review rollback test results; approve plan or require improvements before deployment. |

## Outputs

| Artifact | Type | Description | Retention |
|----------|------|-------------|-----------|
| Rollback plan validation report | evidence | Rollback procedure, trigger conditions, decision authority, pre-production test results, and execution time. | 7 years (DORA) |


## Automation

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Frequency** | per_release |
| **SLA** | — |
| **Tooling** | — |

## Failure Behaviour

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **On failure** | block |
| **Escalate to** | Release Manager |

Deployment is blocked if rollback cannot be validated in pre-production.

## Dependencies

- `RC-06`


## Regulatory Mapping

| Regulation | Article | Obligation |
|------------|---------|------------|
| DORA | Art. 11(6) | ICT business continuity requirements including restoration procedures for failed changes |


## Ownership

**Owner team:** Engineering / Release Management · **Owner role:** Release Manager
